Elbow Types

▸ Material Code Format (EPC Standard)
ITEM— MATL— SIZE— SCH— ET | e.g.  EL9L-AS91-D040-S80-BW  (4" 90° LR Elbow, A335-P91, Sch-80, Butt Weld)
ITEM CODE — ELBOW (LR/SR × 90°/45°) EL9L = Long Radius 90°  |  EL9S = Short Radius 90°
EL4L = Long Radius 45° (incl. 30D, 44.4D → reclassified)
EL4S = Short Radius 45°
⚠ Summary displays 45°/90° only (30D merged into 45D group)
OTHER ITEM CODES PIS=Pipe SMLS | PIW=Pipe Welded | PIN=Nipple
TEE=Tee | TER=Tee Red | RDC=Reducer Con | RDE=Reducer Ecc
SWC/SWE=Swage | FLA=Flange | FLB=Blind Flange
CAP | CPF/CPH=Coupling | WOL=Weldolet
SIZE CODE (D + NPS×10) D005=1/2" | D010=1" | D020=2" | D040=4"
D060=6" | D080=8" | D100=10" | D120=12"
D140=14" | D160=16" | D220=22" | D240=24"
Reducers: D080xD040 = 8"×4" (main×branch)
MATL / SCH / ET CODES CS05=A105/A234-WPB | CS06=A106-B | AS22=F22/P22
AS91=F91/P91 | SS04=TP304 | SS16=TP316
S10/S40/S80/S12/STD | C3K=CL3000 | C6K=CL6000
ET: BW=Butt Weld | SW=Socket Weld | TH=Threaded | RF=Raised Face
